# Mathangi S. — Technical Writer Portfolio

> Portfolio site for Mathangi, a senior technical writer specializing in enterprise security infrastructure, identity and access management (IAM/PAM, OAuth, SAML), and developer-facing documentation (REST APIs, SDKs, and agentic AI features).

The Writing, Videos, and Projects sections contain real work samples.

## Pages

- [About](https://natsatra.github.io/about): Background, domain expertise (IAM, PAM, SIEM, compliance frameworks), documentation methodologies, and how to get in touch.
- [Tech stack](https://natsatra.github.io/tech-stack): Tools used across technical authoring, docs-as-code, API/DevOps documentation, design/diagrams, multimedia production, and project management.
- [Writing](https://natsatra.github.io/writing): Paginated grid of technical writing samples, each tagged by category and topic.
- [Videos](https://natsatra.github.io/videos): Video walkthroughs of Kissflow Apps features.
- [Projects](https://natsatra.github.io/projects): Personal coding projects, each documented with a security-focused write-up.

## Writing samples

- [SDK documentation](https://natsatra.github.io/writing/sdk-docs): Kissflow Apps SDK reference docs — snippets for pages, variables, parameters, and components.
- [API documentation](https://natsatra.github.io/writing/api-docs): Kissflow API reference docs for Portals and Dataforms, covering OAuth and access key authentication.
- [Enterprise SaaS docs](https://natsatra.github.io/writing/kf-docs): Kissflow Apps admin guides — variables, app-to-app lookups, and custom form field components.
- [Enterprise security docs](https://natsatra.github.io/writing/pam-docs): PAM360 admin and integration guides — HSM integration, Kubernetes, and just-in-time privilege elevation.
- [CVE disclosures](https://natsatra.github.io/writing/cve): Verified CVE disclosures for PAM360, Password Manager Pro, and Access Manager Plus.
- [Enterprise security industry report](https://natsatra.github.io/writing/longform): Longform content strategy collateral on PAM practices for healthcare organizations.

## Projects

- [CopyThat: Browser extension](https://natsatra.github.io/projects/copythat): A tabbed, color-coded notepad extension built with vanilla JavaScript — local-only storage, minimal permissions, and a documented threat model.
- [Lunacle: Telegram reminder bot](https://natsatra.github.io/projects/telegram-bot): A serverless Python/Cloudflare Workers bot sending moon-phase and personal reminders — webhook authentication, secret handling, and documented accepted risks.

## Videos

- [AI-powered sample data generation](https://natsatra.github.io/videos/video-1): Tutorial on AI-powered sample data generation in Kissflow Apps dataforms.
- [Building custom components using AI](https://natsatra.github.io/videos/video-2): Walkthrough of AI-powered custom component generation in Kissflow Apps.
- [Building custom form field components](https://natsatra.github.io/videos/video-3): Walkthrough of building a custom form field component in Kissflow Apps using React and Kissflow's native SDKs.
